text.title: Market Sizing with AI Research Tools Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required fields + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns listed at end.

example.note: Too-short market_definition; missing year_horizon, currency, all three methods, reconciliation, citations.

forbidden.pattern: single-method estimate (missing top_down OR bottom_up OR value_theory)
citation older than 2 years vs year_horizon without a flag
